reviews.review_text: CLOSED!!! It’s not a holiday park any more. They do school camps. Lovely staff, though.

Rooms are very lovely. Service is excellent the staff are lovely. The atmosphere was peaceful and very welcoming .we absolutely enjoyed our break away with family. We would definitely recommend it .just a great place .
This is no longer a holiday park!

(PLEASE NOTE THAT THIS PLACE IS NO LONGER A HOLIDAY PARK)

So this was the 3rd time I've gone here, usually going on the June long weekend.

The 1st and 2nd times I went there it was fine. Probably a 3 star. Only this time, on my 3rd time coming, it was different. The cabins were cleaner when I arrived, and the Inflatable Jump Pillow was still inflated after around 10 PM. On my 3rd time coming here, it was just better. Don't know how, it was just better. So, it's a 4 star. In my opinion, it's just not "bizarre" enough to be a 5 star.
Heard they had a killer TikTok RIZZ party here. 100 PERCENT coming back

Awesome
Nice place to spend your weekend or holiday in
Amenities clean but grounds very ordinary especially for $48/ night. Surrounded by people living in tents and cars

Gave it one star despite its scenic setting; unfortunately, the beauty is marred by toxic management, instances of domestic violence, staff mistreatment, disruptive behavior among there kids, and an overall unprofessional atmosphere. Understandably, the place faced closure.||||Its extremely Uncomfortable witnessing the manager, aged 40+, having a temper tantrum in the car park. Such behavior raises concerns about their suitability for a job involving interaction with people.
Very disappointing to see this caravan park changing  it's so run down.
Not one of the best parks we have stayed at, the showers need de-webbing and spiders removed!! Not very inviting
Lovely surroundings.Cosy yurt cottage.could do with a couple of small comfy armchairs tho.We enjoyed our stay there.

Yurts are a bit old only 2 lights work out of 5,  they need updating.
Very disappointing to hear that it has been taking over & we can't holiday here after 1/12
this place is a joke the toilets were not clean and the tops of the shower were caked with mold and gunk the bbqs were not cleaned at all and flithy this park is terribe now so disapointing

Quiet and relaxing stop off! We were here midweek but I imagine it gets packed on the weekends. We had a powered site away from other people. New amenities blocks were very clean. Kitchen is slightly outdated but also clean and had everything you need. We had rain, but the caretaker said you can walk to the beach from camp.
